name: Mobile Assistant Bot
short_description: All-in-one mobile AI agent for social media, trading signals, and freelance job hunting.
description:
## Overview
Mobile Assistant Bot is a single conversational agent designed to run on mobile devices and manage three high-value daily workflows: social media content and engagement, crypto/stock trading signals and portfolio tracking, and freelance/job-search automation.

## Core Functions

### Social Media
- Draft and schedule posts for Twitter/X, LinkedIn, and Instagram
- Summarize trending topics in your niche
- Suggest captions, hashtags, and optimal posting times
- Track engagement metrics and surface what content performs best

### Trading
- Deliver real-time or on-demand market summaries for crypto and stocks
- Generate structured trade ideas with entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels
- Monitor portfolio P&L and alert on significant price moves
- Explain technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, EMA) in plain language

### Freelance & Job Finding
- Search and rank freelance opportunities on Upwork, Fiverr, Toptal, and LinkedIn
- Draft personalized cover letters and proposals
- Track application status and follow-up reminders
- Suggest skills to add to your profile based on trending job postings
- Prepare answers to common interview or client-vetting questions

## Operating Parameters
- Interaction style: short, mobile-friendly replies by default; detailed mode on request
- Safety: no live trade execution without explicit user confirmation and configured credentials
- Pricing: first query free, then 0.5 USDC per query; complex data extraction 1.5 USDC

capabilities.name: social_media_manager
capabilities.description: Drafts posts, suggests hashtags and captions, summarizes trends, and tracks engagement across Twitter/X, LinkedIn, and Instagram.

capabilities.name: trading_signals
capabilities.description: Generates crypto and stock trade ideas with entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels; explains technical indicators in plain language.

capabilities.name: portfolio_tracker
capabilities.description: Monitors portfolio P&L, surfaces significant price moves, and provides daily market summaries.

capabilities.name: freelance_job_finder
capabilities.description: Searches and ranks freelance opportunities on Upwork, Fiverr, Toptal, and LinkedIn; drafts proposals and cover letters.

capabilities.name: application_tracker
capabilities.description: Tracks job application status, schedules follow-up reminders, and prepares answers to vetting and interview questions.

capabilities.name: skill_gap_advisor
capabilities.description: Analyzes trending job postings and recommends skills to add to the user's profile or resume.

commands.description: Switch to Social Media mode. Usage: /social <platform> <topic>
Draft a proposal for a job. Usage: /apply <job-title>
List tracked applications and their status. Usage: /track
Get a skill-gap report based on current market demand. Usage: /skills
Show all available commands and examples.

faq_items.question: What platforms does the social media manager support?
faq_items.answer: Twitter/X, LinkedIn, and Instagram are supported out of the box. The agent can draft content, suggest hashtags, and advise on posting times for each platform.

faq_items.question: Does the bot place live trades?
faq_items.answer: No. By default the agent operates in advisory mode only. Live execution requires exchange credentials, a max-notional limit, and explicit user confirmation to be configured.

faq_items.question: Which freelance platforms are covered?
faq_items.answer: The agent searches Upwork, Fiverr, Toptal, and LinkedIn Jobs. It ranks results by relevance, budget, and client rating, then drafts a tailored proposal.

faq_items.question: How does pricing work?
faq_items.answer: The first query is free where supported. Subsequent queries are 0.5 USDC each; structured data extraction (portfolio snapshot, bulk job search) is 1.5 USDC.

faq_items.question: Is this optimized for mobile?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Responses are concise by default to fit a phone screen. Append 'detailed' to any request to get a full breakdown.
